full_text:
Gao Fan 高蕃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Fan (高蕃). Sent by Yuan Shang to block the Yellow River but he was defeated by Li Dian. Gao Fan was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
